welcomeScreen.title: We are TravelCash!
welcomeScreen.supportText: Your Digital Travel Wallet, now easier to use and more convenient.

contactDataScreen.title: Contact Information
contactDataScreen.description: Please fill out all the fields to continue.

codeValidationScreen.title: Verification Code
codeValidationScreen.description: Enter the verification code sent to your mobile via Email.

codeActivationScreen.title: Account Activation
codeActivationScreen.description: Please use the code sent to your email to activate your account. After this step, your information will be auto-filled.

setActivationPasswordScreen.title: Password
setActivationPasswordScreen.description: Create a password to access your app account. Your password must be at least 4 digits long.

setPasswordScreen.title: Password
setPasswordScreen.description: Create a password with at least 4 numeric characters.

onboardingScreen.stepOneSubtitle: Use your credits on any tourism-related service, receive Cashback from our partners, and always have money to travel.
onboardingScreen.stepTwoTitle: Use your Cashback to travel around the world!
onboardingScreen.stepTwoSubtitle: You can use your credits in more than 600 thousand hotels, airline and bus tickets, travel packages and much more!
onboardingScreen.stepThreeTitle: Receive and use them as you wish
onboardingScreen.stepThreeSubtitle: At TravelCash, your credits never expire! As long as you log in or make a transaction in your account at least once a year.

signInScreen.title: Login
signInScreen.unexpectederror: An unexpected error has occurred, please try again later.

homeScreen.firstDepositCardText: Make a deposit into your TravelCash account and increase your credits!
homeScreen.statementCardText: Access your statement and view all your transactions
homeScreen.conciergeCardText: Our Concierge team can help you!

statement.title: Statement
statement.balanceInformation: You can choose the currency and display, and the balance will be updated according to the dollar exchange rate. The balance expires after 12 months of inactivity.

depositValueScreen.title: Deposit amount
depositValueScreen.subtitle: Enter the amount you wish to transfer to your TravelCash account. Remember that your balance will be in Dollars! The amount in other currencies will depend on the exchange rate.

depositCardsScreen.title: Debit/Credit Card
depositCardsScreen.subtitle: Enter your card details to complete the transaction.
depositCardsScreen.inputPlaceholderName: Type the name on the card
depositCardsScreen.inputLabelSaveThisCard: Use this card for future transactions

depositPixScreen.title: Pix (Payment method only available in Brazil)
depositPixScreen.subtitle: To make the payment via Pix, copy the code or scan the QR Code.
depositPixScreen.CopyAndPaste: Copy and paste the pix key into your bank's app to make a deposit to your TravelCash wallet.
depositPixScreen.description: After making the deposit via PIX, send the transfer receipt to the concierge via e-mail to deposito@travelcash.me

myTravelCardRecharge.title: Charge your TravelCard
myTravelCardRecharge.subtitle: Type the amount you wish to transfer from your TravelCash account to your TravelCard. Remember that your balance will be in Dollars! The amount in other currencies will depend on the exchange rate.
myTravelCardRecharge.inputPlaceholderValue: Type amount in your local currency

profile.title: Profile
profile.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.description: Are you sure you want to logout?

travelShopScreen.conciergeCardText: The concierge can assist you personally!
travelShopScreen.subTitle: Here, you have access to our call center, and through our Concierge service, you can redeem your balance for accommodations, airline tickets, and everything else you need for your trip.

conciergeBottomSheet.conciergeTitle: Here you can request a concierge to help you with whatever you need.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.acept: I agree to the TravelCash Terms and Conditions of Use.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.sendLink: We sent a link to your email
forgotPassword.redefinePassword: so you can reset your password
